LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrime.label: Liberty Prime
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrime.description: A massive pre-war war machine jointly developed by RobCo Industries, General Atomics International, and Mass Fusion for the United States Army. It stands approximately twenty meters tall and is equipped with twin head-mounted energy cannons and a supply of tactical nuclear bombs for destroying fortified positions. Originally designed to liberate Anchorage from Chinese forces, it was never deployed before the Great War due to power supply failures.
